GG0130E1_BTHE_SELF_STRT_CD GG0130E1 Admission Performance Bathing Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's usual performance in their ability to bathe/shower in shower or tub, at the time of admission. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's usual performance in their ability to bathe/shower in shower or tub, at the time of admission. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 =
